tasks.label: sim current file
tasks.command: FILE=${fileBasenameNoExtension} && FILE=${FILE#tb_} && mkdir -p sims && iverilog -I src/ -g2012 -o sims/${FILE}_sim test_bench/tb_${FILE}.sv src/${FILE}.sv && vvp sims/${FILE}_sim -fst +DUMPFILE=sims/${FILE}_dump.fst && RUST_LOG=error surfer sims/${FILE}_dump.fst
